mapper.select: SELECT id, audio_no, result_id, result_item_id, task_id, asset_id, audio_url, file_size, duration, record_time, longitude, latitude, remark, is_offline, sync_status, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM inspection_audio WHERE result_id = #{resultId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, audio_no, result_id, result_item_id, task_id, asset_id, audio_url, file_size, duration, record_time, longitude, latitude, remark, is_offline, sync_status, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM inspection_audio WHERE result_item_id = #{resultItemId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inspection_audio (audio_no, result_id, result_item_id, task_id, asset_id, audio_url, file_size, duration, record_time, longitude, latitude, remark, is_offline, sync_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.audioNo}, #{item.resultId}, #{item.resultItemId}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.audioUrl}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.duration}, #{item.recordTime}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.remark}, #{item.isOffline}, #{item.syncStatus}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
